name: kafka_consumer
explanation: The check connects to a Kafka broker bootstrap list (default port 9092 for plaintext, 9093 for SSL/SASL). Strictly per spec only `kafka_connect_str` is required, so unauthenticated localhost setups would discover via a Metadata API request. In practice, production Kafka uses SASL/PLAIN, SASL/SCRAM, or mTLS, all of which need credentials or certs that aren't on the wire. A discovery layer must probe the bootstrap port and either (a) succeed with PLAINTEXT or (b) note the protocol mismatch and require credentials.
notes: Despite the name, this check uses the Kafka Admin client; not JMX. Other Kafka-related integrations (kafka, kafka_streams) may use JMX and should be classified separately.
